data.title: Dogecoin's Value Could Soar 212%-260% Says Crypto Analyst: Notes 'Point Of Interest' On Macro Chart
data.description: A widely-followed cryptocurrency analyst reiterated his bullish forecast for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) on Tuesday, calling the $1.30-$1.50 range a “point of interest.”

data.title: Bluesky COO Rose Wang Addresses Platform's Anti-Musk Label, Monetization Plans: 'We Would Never Put Speech Behind A Paywall'
data.description: Bluesky COO Rose Wang clarified the platform's political neutrality, emphasizing its commitment to serving a diverse global user base and stated that it would never charge for core features like speech, while also discussing its rapid growth, plans for subscriptions, and remote team structure.

data.title: Celsius Network Founder Alex Mashinsky Pleads Guity To Two Counts Of Fraud, Including Manipulating In-House Crypto's Price
data.description:
Alex Mashinsky, the disgraced founder and ex-CEO of cryptocurrency lender Celsius Network, admitted guilt to two counts of fraud on Tuesday.



What Happened: Despite his initial plea of not guilty, Mashinsky confessed to two of the seven charges during a hearing before a U.S. District Judge, according to a Reuters report.

data.title: Palantir Paving The Way For AI Transformation, With Salesforce And Oracle To Follow, Says Dan Ives: The AI Revolution Goes Beyond Magnificent 7
data.description: Salesforce Inc. and Palantir Technologies Inc. are spearheading what Wedbush Securities Managing Director Dan Ives calls an "AI revolution" in the enterprise software industry, in an interview on Tuesday, Dec. 3, 2024, with Oracle Corp. positioned to capitalize on the transformation in 2025.

data.title: XRP Becomes Third-Most Valued Crypto — Beats Boeing, Nike In Market Capitalization
